author: claude
content: Related: GH #1143 (Rewrite SQLiteStorageProvider to use SQLAlchemy) is the natural place to resolve this -- the rewrite owns _create_tables/store_record and the unknown-table handling. Also relates to crosslink #5 (PR #1149 SQLAlchemy storage) and the local feat/sqlalchemy-postgresql-v2 branch. No GH issue directly reports the silent 'Unsupported record' drop as of 2026-06-14.
